pfs.note: Characters with access to firearms gain access to accessories that can be used with those weapons.

abilities.effect: The next Strike you make this round with the gun to which the scope is attached has its scatter radius increased by 5 feet.
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: More of a field projector than a scope, this small cylinder of magnetite has been enchanted to spread and accelerate the shrapnel of a scatter weapon further than the weapon's natural capabilities. Furthermore, some of the floating magnetite inside the scope's structure can help you when attempting to determine the your allies' locations. The magnetite scope grants you a +2 item bonus to Survival checks to Sense Direction when using the scope to assist you in navigating. This scope can only be attached to firearms with the scatter trait.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Transmutation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the transmutation school of magic, typically changing something’s form.

variants.name: Magnetite Scope (Greater)
variants.text: The item bonus is +3, and activating the scope increases the scatter radius by 10 feet.
